Day is for work]

Rhythm o(Day 23
It is the effort to divide day and night further and understand
it further lead to the divisions such as Yama, Pancha
bhootodaya, Kshenika graha etc. Since it is rhythm of time
that greatly influence (and determine) the moment of birth,
study of divisions of 'Ahoratra' is very much important in
understanding the same. Therefore let us go through them
briefly prior to taking up the further discussion of birth time
rectification methods, which will refer back to these divisions.
To avoid confusion while discussing birth time rectification
methods, a clear understanding of these divisions is a pre
requisite.
Yama
Time divisions·such as Yuga, Year, Ayana, Ritu, Month,
Week, Ahoratra, Day, Night all originated due to the effort of
ancient people to understand time. The ancient indian interest
to study the energy of Samvatsara Purusha (Year personified)
depicted in Vedas never ended -it grew to the study of rhythm
